title: About
text: Hi! My name is Susie Kastl, I am a sophomore at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln double majoring in Advertising & Public Relations and Sports Media & Communication. In my Sports Data & Visualization class, I focus on finding the “so what” behind numbers to help brands connect with their audience. Here is a blog about whether the Bob Devaney Center is more than just a home court-proving that in Lincoln, the crowd is truly the 7th player on the floor.
